scope: Run a symmetric enterprise cluster playoff across the four leading enterprise-response domains

decision_context.prior_state: The provisional benchmark proposal showed that the narrow RFP recommendation did not survive a broader enterprise panel, but it still did not fully resolve the ordering inside the enterprise cluster because different domains occupied different lanes.
decision_context.decision: Move all four enterprise-response domains into promotion review, remove the proposal lane and discovery breakout entirely, and use that symmetric cluster playoff to rank first cluster priority, second priority, and maintained admission readiness.
decision_context.why_now: The repo needed a stable cluster-wide ranking before another maintained benchmark admission attempt.

files_expected.purpose: Stores the symmetric enterprise cluster playoff spec.
Stores the symmetric enterprise cluster playoff run.
Summarizes the stable cluster ranking and admission decision.
Captures the request and verification plan for the cluster-playoff tranche.

planned_steps: Generate a symmetric enterprise cluster playoff spec with all four enterprise domains in promotion review
Rank first and second cluster priority
Decide whether any enterprise domain is now strong enough for maintained benchmark admission

expected_checks: all four enterprise domains appear in promotion_review_domain_ids
the final note states whether any enterprise domain earns maintained benchmark admission
the final note ranks first and second cluster priority

guardrails: Do not edit the maintained benchmark library in this tranche
Keep the cluster playoff in exploratory_frontier
Use the playoff result to rank the cluster honestly even if it weakens earlier narrower conclusions
